name: io.github.lab94/frenchie-skill
description: Frenchie — your agent's best friend. An MCP-first multimodal utility that makes AI agents more capable. Today: OCR for PDFs/images and transcription for audio/video into clean Markdown, plus image generation from text prompts. Next releases: file extraction (Excel → Markdown) and Markdown-to-file generation.

environmentVariables.name: FRENCHIE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Frenchie API key (starts with fr_). Create one at https://getfrenchie.dev/dashboard/api-keys — first signup comes with 100 free credits.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer fr_... — your Frenchie API key
